## Checklist
- [ ] Linked to its issue with `Closes #N`
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] Small and focused (one concern)
- [ ] No secrets committed; secrets in environment variables only
- [ ] Database changes have an Alembic migration

## Compliance / security
- [ ] No AI output is presented to a customer as legal advice
- [ ] `delivered` still requires a recorded attorney approval (enforced server-side)
- [ ] All data stays scoped to the requesting organisation
- [ ] Flag here if this touches an area that needs the one-off security review before real client contracts
